message:
feat(core): semantic search quality harness with reproducible metrics (wa-oegrb.5.5)

Introduce \`semantic_quality\` module (457 LOC) providing a deterministic,
CI-friendly evaluation harness for semantic and hybrid search quality:

- \`QualityMetric\` enum: Precision/Recall/NDCG/MRR with per-query
  computation from ranked result lists and relevance judgments
- \`QualityThreshold\` struct: per-metric pass/fail gates with
  configurable minimum values
- \`EvaluationCorpus\` builder: query + expected-relevant-ids pairs,
  producing \`EvaluationReport\` with aggregate pass/fail and
  per-query metric breakdown
- Three-lane comparison: lexical baseline vs semantic baseline vs
  hybrid fusion, with lane-level metric aggregation
- Machine-readable JSON report for CI integration and regression
  trending
- Deterministic by design: queries are pure ranked lists, metrics
  are computed from stable relevance sets

Also adds integration test suite (61 LOC) in
semantic_quality_harness_tests.rs validating the harness API and
threshold enforcement logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
